# Design System

*Template v2 — Auto-generated 2026-07-24*

## Theme
- **Base:** Ember (Give A Bit family default)
- **Background:** Dark warm (`#0c0618`)
- **Accent:** `#ff8c00` (ember orange)
- **Text:** Light lavender (`#e2d8f0`)

## Typography
- **Body:** Figtree (sans-serif)
- **Code:** JetBrains Mono
- **Headings:** Syne (display)

## Safe Harbour
All Give A Bit sites display: "Safe Harbour · Part of the Give A Bit family · Bitcoin sovereignty first"

## Brand
- Logo: brand-mark.png (128x128 brand mark)
- Family: Give A Bit portfolio
